# Singapore Property & Finance - Daily Brief (property + finance)
_Auto-generated 20 Jun 2026 (SGT). Source-linked. General information only; exact figures and eligibility are confirmed case by case._

## HDB & BTO Updates

- **June 2026 BTO exercise opens 6,952 flats across 7 projects** - HDB opened applications from 17–24 June 2026 for flats spanning mature towns such as Bishan and Bukit Merah as well as non-mature locations. [Source](https://www.99.co/singapore/insider/june-2026-bto-updates/)

- **June 2026 BTO 4-room prices range from $302,000 to $592,000** - The seven projects cover Bukit Merah, Bishan, Ang Mo Kio, Sembawang, and Woodlands, with waiting times of 31 to 54 months. [Source](https://stackedhomes.com/june-2026-bto-launch-review/)

- **October 2026 BTO exercise to offer around 7,970 flats** - HDB's final BTO exercise of the year will span Bedok, Geylang, Sembawang, Tengah, Toa Payoh, and Yishun, with Bayshore and Toa Payoh projects expected to draw strong interest. [Source](https://www.99.co/singapore/insider/october-bto-2026/)

## Private Home Sales & Rental Market

- **New private home sales fell to 447 units in May 2026** - The figure is a sharp drop from 1,548 units in April, reflecting a quieter launch calendar rather than a shift in underlying demand. [Source](https://www.99.co/singapore/insider/new-private-home-sales-ease-in-may-amid-quieter-launch-calendar/)

- **Condo and HDB rents both eased in May 2026** - Month-on-month declines were recorded across both segments, with growing supply and less intense tenant competition cited as contributing factors, even as condo rents had hit an all-time high in April. [Source](https://www.99.co/singapore/insider/condo-hdb-rental-market-may-2026/)

## Notable Transaction & Market Observations

- **Geylang freehold condo unit nets S$2.7 million profit — a District 14 record** - A unit at The Waterina changed hands for S$3.7 million in June 2026, recording the highest profit gain ever seen in District 14. [Source](https://www.99.co/singapore/insider/geylang-freehold-condo-fetches-s27m-profit-the-highest-in-district-14/)

---
_Shared by Andrew Soh, PropNex Realty. News and general context only - not financial advice._
